seo.title: Law Firm Marketing That Books More Consults
seo.description: Law firm marketing from a Woburn, MA agency: local SEO, reputation, and a 24/7 AI intake receptionist that turns calls into booked consults. Free audit.

sections.heading: Law firm marketing that turns searches into signed clients
sections.subheading: Found on Google, chosen by clients, answered 24/7
sections.intro: When someone needs a lawyer, they search, they call, and they hire whoever answers first and looks most trustworthy. AQ Marketing gets your firm into the local results for the practice areas you actually want, builds the reviews that make clients pick you, and puts a 24/7 AI intake receptionist behind every click — so the 9pm "I just got arrested" call gets answered instead of going to the firm down the street. Local SEO and AI websites, one team, under one roof.

ctas.label: See how we rank you locally

sections.eyebrow: Why most firms lose the lead
sections.heading: Your next client is searching right now — and calling whoever shows up first
sections.subheading: We get your firm found, chosen, and answered

paragraphs.html: Legal is one of the most competitive things you can market. The big firms outspend you, the directories sit above you, and the searcher who needs help isn't comparison shopping — they call the first credible result and book. If your firm isn't in the top local results with strong reviews, you never even get the chance to compete for that client.

We've spent two decades getting Massachusetts businesses to the top of local search, and lawyer marketing is the same fight, sharper: own the Google map pack for your practice areas and towns, stack the reviews that make a nervous client trust you, and make sure your site loads fast and reads like a firm worth hiring. Law firm SEO, reviews, and a conversion-ready site — all run in-house from our Woburn office. No national vendor that's never marketed an attorney.

Then there's the part most agencies ignore: intake. A missed call is a missed case. Every site we build comes with a 24/7 AI intake receptionist and chatbot, so the after-hours caller, the weekend form-fill, and the live-chat question all get answered and booked — not sent to voicemail. See how the AI receptionist handles intake, or explore the other industries we serve.

items.a: Law firm marketing is the work that gets your firm found by people who need a lawyer and turns those searches into booked consultations. In practice that means ranking in Google's local results for your practice areas, building the reviews that make clients trust you, running a fast and credible website, and capturing every call and form. AQ Marketing handles all of it — local SEO, reputation, website, and a 24/7 AI intake receptionist — under one roof.

items.q: How do law firms get more clients from Google?
items.a: Two things win legal clients on Google: showing up in the local map pack for searches like "[practice area] lawyer near me," and having the reviews and site that make a nervous client choose you over the next result. Our attorney marketing pairs Google Business Profile optimization, local citations, and real reviews with a site tuned for the practice areas and towns you want — then makes sure the resulting calls actually get answered.

items.q: Does law firm SEO really work for a small or solo practice?
items.a: Yes — local SEO is often where a smaller firm has the advantage. You don't have to outspend a national firm to win the map pack in your own towns; you have to be more relevant, better reviewed, and faster to answer. We focus your law firm SEO on the specific practice areas and Greater Boston towns you serve, so you compete where it counts instead of fighting for a whole state.

items.q: Why do law firms lose so many leads?
items.a: Because legal clients don't wait. Someone who needs a lawyer calls the first firm that looks credible and answers the phone — often after hours or on a weekend. If your call goes to voicemail, that case goes to the next firm on the list. That's why every site we build includes a 24/7 AI intake receptionist that answers, qualifies the matter, and books the consult around the clock. See how AI intake works.

items.q: How much does law firm marketing cost?
items.a: Most firms start with our Smart Website & Marketing Package at $500/month (a 12-month agreement), which covers your website, Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, AI intake receptionist, and chatbot. In competitive practice areas we add the SEO accelerator at $1,299/month for ongoing content and link building. You own everything we build. The best starting point is our free 20-point audit, before you spend a dollar.

items.q: How long until a law firm sees results?
items.a: Local SEO is a build, not a switch, and legal is one of the most competitive verticals — so it takes steady monthly work, not a one-time fix. You'll see measurable progress, fast, and full transparency on what we're doing and why. No legitimate agency can promise a #1 ranking or a specific number of cases — Google doesn't let anyone — so be wary of any marketer who does.

items.q: Do you only work with law firms in Boston?
items.a: No. We're based in Woburn, MA and work with firms across Greater Boston — the North Shore, MetroWest, Middlesex County, and the city itself — and we take on Massachusetts-adjacent firms case by case. Most of the work is done remotely, so where your office sits doesn't change how we work. Our Woburn office is open by appointment only.

items.q: What makes AQ Marketing different for law firms?
items.a: Three things. We pair local SEO with AI intake under one roof, so your rankings and your booked consults come from the same team. We've marketed Massachusetts local businesses since 2003. And you own everything — your site, domain, Google Business Profile, and data — from day one, and you see measurable progress, fast. See the other industries we serve or browse all our services.

sections.heading: Ready to fill your calendar with booked consults?
sections.body: Get a free 20-point local audit for your firm. We'll benchmark your Google Business Profile, reviews, and site speed against your top 5 local competitors, then map the three highest-ROI moves to get your phone ringing with the cases you want. Written action plan, on the house — typically back to you within 2 business days.
